title: gastrochilus rutilans
intro: Gastrochilus rutilans, also known as the Red Vanda Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. Gastrochilus rutilans is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
